name: openai-compatible
description: Any OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions endpoint (self-hosted, proxy, or an unlisted cloud). Supply the base URL + API key.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Base URL
x-meta.help: The OpenAI-compatible base URL (should end at /v1), e.g. https://my-gateway/v1.

x-meta.label: API Key
x-meta.help: Bearer API key for the endpoint. Leave empty to fall back to the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: The model id served by your endpoint.
